text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Eishin Flash has been extremely successful in the
G1 races at Tokyo Racecourse, and an event is
held to celebrate her numerous accomplishments.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She talks about her feelings toward racing. We
commemorate our journey with a photo together
next to the monument memorializing all her hard
work.
